---
title: "Hiatus — Metrics"
---

# Metric definitions

## Warming

Raw monthly LSWT → annual mean → Theil–Sen slope × 40 years.

## Acceleration

Sen slope of first-differenced annual STL trend.

## STARS

L=7, p=0.05. Minimum regime length 7 years, shift significance p < 0.05.

## Clustering

K=8, z-scored annual STL trend + normalised mean temperature.
Cluster ordering by mean temperature (C1=coldest → C8=hottest).

## Teleconnection indices

ENSO (Nino3.4), PDO, AMO, NAO, AO. Annual means from monthly NOAA data.
